title: Wall Street Readies Data Center IPOs as AI-Linked Debuts Surge
title_cn: 随着人工智能相关上市激增，华尔街准备数据中心首次公开募股
summary: Wall Street banks are getting ready to raise billions of dollars taking data center companies public, even after IPO investors have already piled into anything that looks like a bet on artificial intelligence spending.

title: ESG Currents: Paying for Results - World Bank on Outcome Bonds
title_cn: ESG 潮流：为结果付费 - 世界银行成果债券
summary: Outcome bonds link investor returns to measurable results and are seeing increased issuance, led by institutions like the World Bank. In this ESG Currents episode, Bloomberg Intelligence ESG analysts Melanie Rua and Chris Ratti speak with Jorge Familiar of the World Bank Group and Stephen Liberatore of Nuveen about how these structures are scaling. The discussion focuses on how investors price outcome risk alongside credit risk, how deals are structured - including the World Bank’s $120 million

title: Singapore Defers Considering Political Pay Review on Iran War
title_cn: 新加坡推迟考虑伊朗战争政治薪酬审查
summary: Singapore will postpone considering an independent panel’s recommendations on the salaries of political office holders until the economic impact of the Iran war becomes clearer, a government minister said.

title_cn: 沙特风险投资公司不顾战争继续推进筹款

title: Where to Invest Now That Moon Race 2.0 Is Here
title_cn: 月球竞赛 2.0 已经到来，该往哪里投资
summary: As Morgan Stanley analysts put it, “space is back in a big way,” with renewed momentum spanning everything from raw materials and mining to fuel and propulsion systems.

title: European Bond Market Has Record Day as Rates Outlook Worsens
title_cn: 利率前景恶化，欧洲债券市场创历史新高
summary: Companies flooded Europe’s bond market at a record pace, rushing to lock in funding as central banks warn the Iran conflict could reignite inflation and force interest rates higher.

title: Sixth Street BDC Tumbles on Quarterly Loss, Dividend Cut
title_cn: 第六街 BDC 因季度亏损和股息削减而暴跌
summary: A private credit fund managed by Sixth Street Partners tumbled after lowering its dividend and reporting a quarterly loss, as market-wide volatility eroded the fair value of its loan portfolio.

title: US Exports of Oil Products Reach Record on Diesel Demand
title_cn: 美国石油产品出口因柴油需求创历史新高
summary: US exports of oil products rose to a record high last week as the nation continues to help make up for disruptions to fuel supplies sparked by the Iran war.

title: OPEC Output Falls to New 36-Year Low on Iran War, Survey Shows
title_cn: 调查显示，伊朗战争导致 OPEC 产量跌至 36 年来新低
summary: OPEC’s crude production fell to a new 36-year low last month as the Iran war continued to choke off exports from the Persian Gulf and forced further shut-ins, according to a Bloomberg survey.

title: Poland Holds Rates as Iran War Fallout Stokes Inflation
title_cn: 伊朗战争后果加剧通胀，波兰维持利率不变
summary: Poland’s central bank kept interest rates unchanged for a second month as the fallout of the Iran war on energy prices revives long-benign domestic inflation.

title: Stocks Rise and Oil Falls as Iran Deal Hopes Mount: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着伊朗协议希望升温，股市上涨，油价下跌：市场结束
summary: Stocks climbed around the world, joining gains in bonds as oil retreated on hopes the US and Iran are nearing a deal to end a war that has jolted markets and clouded the economic outlook.

title: Oil and Gas Plunge as Iran Weighs New US Proposal to End War
title_cn: 伊朗考虑美国结束战争的新提议，石油和天然气价格暴跌
summary: Oil briefly dropped below $100 a barrel and gas slumped, as Iran evaluated a new proposal from the US to end their near 10-week war.

title: CME Group to Launch US Dollar Overnight Repo Benchmark
title_cn: 芝商所将推出美元隔夜回购基准
summary: CME Group Inc. on Wednesday launched a new benchmark rate tied to overnight funding costs in the US, adding to its suite of global risk-free rates.

title: Gold, Silver Surge as US-Iran Truce Hopes Ease Inflation Risks
title_cn: 美伊休战有望缓解通胀风险，黄金、白银飙升
summary: Gold and silver surged the most in about a month as hopes of a US-Iran deal drove oil prices lower and eased inflation expectations.

title: Lilly Looks to Sell About $8 Billion of Debt to Fund Deals
title_cn: 礼来公司希望出售约 80 亿美元的债务来资助交易
summary: Eli Lilly & Co. is seeking to raise about $8 billion from an investment-grade bond sale, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter, as part of the company’s effort to fund an acquisition spree.

title: SharkNinja CEO: Consumer Under Pressure as Company Expands
title_cn: SharkNinja 首席执行官：随着公司扩张，消费者面临压力
summary: SharkNinja CEO Mark Barrocas joined Bloomberg Open Interest to break down how the company is thriving despite a pressured consumer, revealing the strategy behind its viral product growth, global expansion, and its push to become fully AI-native. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Prices Tumble as US-Iran Diplomatic Efforts Gain Traction
title_cn: 美伊外交努力受到关注，油价暴跌
summary: Oil briefly dips below $100 as markets react to renewed hopes of a US, Iran deal. Bloomberg's Mia Gindis breaks down why traders may be overreacting, how thin market participation is distorting prices, and why even a diplomatic breakthrough will not fix supply overnight. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Stocks Hit Record, Currencies Rise on Peace Deal Hopes
title_cn: 新兴股市创历史新高，和平协议希望推动货币上涨
summary: Emerging-market stocks rallied to an all-time high and a currency index returned to pre-war levels as traders grew optimistic that the US and Iran are moving closer to a peace deal.

title: Fed's Musalem Sees Risks Shifting More Toward Inflation
title_cn: 美联储穆萨利姆认为风险更多转向通胀
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis President Alberto Musalem says there is a lot of uncertainty over the future path for the economy and monetary policy during remarks at an event in Fairhope, Alabama, organized by the Mississippi Bankers Association. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Target’s New Dress Code Isn’t the Answer
title_cn: 塔吉特的新着装规范并不是答案
summary: Target has a new employee dress code, but it won’t fix what’s broken at the company, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Beth Kowitt explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Latam Airlines Surges as Demand Withstands Jet Fuel Price Shocks
title_cn: 拉美航空因需求经受航空燃油价格冲击而激增
summary: Latam Airlines Group SA shares surged after the region’s largest carrier by market value beat earnings expectations and said demand had remained resilient to higher fares driven by surging jet fuel costs.

title: Disney Films, Parks Lift Profit in Debut Quarter for New CEO
title_cn: 新任首席执行官上任后，迪士尼电影和公园实现盈利
summary: Walt Disney Co. posted stronger results than Wall Street expected thanks to improved profitability at its streaming business, new Avatar and Zootopia movies, and guests spending more at the company’s resorts and on cruises.

title: Fed’s Musalem Says Risks Are Shifting More Toward Inflation
title_cn: 美联储穆萨利姆表示风险正更多地转向通胀
summary: Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis President Alberto Musalem said there is much uncertainty over the future path for the economy and monetary policy, but he sees risks rising more for inflation than for employment.

title: Apollo Sees Assets Top $1 Trillion for the First Time Ever
title_cn: Apollo 资产首次突破 1 万亿美元
summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. eclipsed $1 trillion of assets under management on record first-quarter inflows and reported earnings that beat Wall Street estimates.

title: France Says Maritime Group Ready to Escort Ships in Hormuz
title_cn: 法国称海事集团已准备好为霍尔木兹海峡的船只护航
summary: A maritime coalition led by France and the UK is ready to escort tankers through the Strait of Hormuz if Iran agrees to a US proposal to end the war, according to a French official.

title: US Punts on Debt Auctions, Signaling No Changes Into 2027
title_cn: 美国押注债务拍卖，表明 2027 年不会发生任何变化
summary: The US Treasury signaled it’s still comfortable issuing the shortest-dated debt to meet escalating government borrowing needs — even as warnings emerge about the strategy’s risks.

title: Charlotte Wins $215 Million Financing for New Airport Runway
title_cn: 夏洛特赢得新机场跑道 2.15 亿美元融资
summary: Charlotte received the green light on Tuesday to issue $215 million in revenue bonds that will finance a new runway at Charlotte Douglas International Airport.

title: Iran Evaluating US Proposal as Trump Warns of ‘Bombing’
title_cn: 特朗普警告“轰炸”，伊朗正在评估美国的提议
summary: Iran is evaluating a new US proposal to end their war, with a response from Tehran expected via mediator Pakistan in the next two days. US President Donald Trump posted on social media on Wednesday, “If they don’t agree, the bombing starts.” Tyler Kendall reports on Bloomberg Television.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CVS Boosts Outlook for 2026 After Aetna Profits Increase
title_cn: Aetna 利润增加后，CVS 上调 2026 年展望
summary: CVS Health Corp. raised its earnings outlook for the year after profit and revenue in the first quarter exceeded analyst expectations, the latest in a string of positive reports from US health conglomerates.

title: Nvidia Stock Falls Behind as Big Tech Rivals Enter Its Territory
title_cn: 随着大型科技竞争对手进入其领地，英伟达股价下跌
summary: This earnings season has delivered plenty of good news for the artificial intelligence trade, but instead of bidding up Nvidia Corp. shares, investors have been dumping them.

title: Greer on EU Complying With Trade Deal, Trump to China
title_cn: 格里尔谈欧盟遵守贸易协议、特朗普对中国
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer says he expects the European Union to keep "its side of the trade deal" that was agreed to in July. The EU has not ratified the package yet. Greer also says President Donald Trump will discuss China's purchases of Iranian oil when he meets with Xi Jinping next week. Greer speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran War Boosts Russia’s April Oil Tax Revenue to Six-Month High
title_cn: 伊朗战争使俄罗斯4月份石油税收入创六个月新高
summary: Russia’s oil tax revenues jumped to a six-month high last month as the Kremlin started reaping the benefits of a crude rally driven by the war in Iran. With oil still trading near $100 a barrel, the windfall is set to continue.

title: US Gasoline at $5 ‘Not Likely,’ Oil Analyst Schork Says
title_cn: 石油分析师肖克表示，美国汽油价格“不太可能”达到 5 美元
summary: Stephen Schork, principal and editor at The Schork Group, explains how a potential deal to end the Iran war can impact the global oil market and why US gasoline prices are unlikely to reach $5 a gallon. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Will Address China Buying Iranian Oil, Greer Says
title_cn: 格里尔表示，特朗普将讨论中国购买伊朗石油的问题
summary: US President Trump and Chinese President Xi will discuss China’s purchases of Iranian oil, Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said on "Bloomberg Surveillance." The two leaders are scheduled to meet in Beijing on May 14 and 15. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google Makes EU Offer to Avert Fines in News Search Case
title_cn: 谷歌向欧盟提出在新闻搜索案中避免罚款的提议
summary: Google has proposed changes to how it displays news results across its search engine in a bid to avoid adding to its €9.5 billion ($11.2 billion) running total of European Union competition fines.

title: Invesco's Brill on the Big Tech Debt Frenzy to Fund AI
title_cn: 景顺（Invesco）在为人工智能提供资金的大型科技债务狂潮中表现出色
summary: Technology companies are selling bonds anywhere they can to help pay for their gusher of spending on artificial intelligence, according to Matt Brill, head of North America investment-grade credit for Invesco. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Google DeepMind Takes Minority Stake in ‘Eve Online’ Maker
title_cn: 谷歌 DeepMind 收购《夏娃在线》制作公司少数股权
summary: Artificial intelligence research is plunging further into video games.

title: Modi, Lam Meet as India and Vietnam Deepen AI, Defense Ties
title_cn: 莫迪与林郑月娥会面，印度和越南深化人工智能和国防关系
summary: India and Vietnam agreed to strengthen economic and defense ties as both sides seek to deepen their partnership while tensions persist in the Middle East.

title: SpaceX Financials Flagged as Concern to SEC by Advocacy Group
title_cn: Advocacy Group 将 SpaceX 的财务状况标记为 SEC 关注的问题
summary: SOC Investment Group, an adviser to union-affiliated pension funds, is urging US regulators to probe SpaceX’s financials ahead of a Wall Street debut that could value the company at more than $2 trillion, citing concerns over its relationships with Elon Musk’s other ventures.

title: Nvidia Inks $500 Million Deal for Shares in Fiber Maker Corning
title_cn: Nvidia 斥资 5 亿美元收购光纤制造商康宁股份
summary: Nvidia Corp. has bought $500 million worth of rights for shares in the fiber-optic cable maker Corning Inc. as part of a broader partnership between the two companies aimed at expanding artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Uber Beats on Bookings Outlook in Sign of Growing US Demand
title_cn: Uber 的预订前景好于美国需求增长的迹象
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. provided a better-than-expected forecast for bookings, signaling that robust demand from US commuters and travelers will offset impact from geopolitical tensions in the Middle East.

title: Invesco Says Big Tech Needs ‘Every Dollar’ It Can Get in AI Debt
title_cn: 景顺表示，大型科技公司需要在人工智能债务中投入“每一块钱”
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s debt issuance in Europe and Canada underscores Big Tech’s relentless drive to find funds anywhere to pay for the industry’s stampede into artificial intelligence, according to Matt Brill at Invesco.

title: AMD Soars as AI Demand Fuels Better-Than-Expected Sales Outlook
title_cn: 人工智能需求推动销售前景好于预期，AMD 飙升
summary: Advanced Micro Devices Inc., the leading challenger to Nvidia Corp. in AI computing chips, soared to a record in early trading after a flood of data center spending bolstered its sales forecast.

title: CoreWeave Gets Lower Costs on $3.1 Billion Chip-Backed Loan
title_cn: CoreWeave 通过 31 亿美元筹码支持贷款降低成本
summary: CoreWeave Inc. has secured lower borrowing costs on a first-of-its-kind $3.1 billion loan backed by customer contracts for microchips, benefiting from strong investor demand for artificial intelligence exposure.

title: The World Is Scrambling to Remake Semiconductor Supply Chains
title_cn: 世界正在争先恐后地重塑半导体供应链
summary: On this episode of Bloomberg Primer, we explain how companies and governments are rethinking where chips are made.

title: Microsoft in Talks to Ax Energy Pledge Amid Data Center Boom
title_cn: 微软正在就数据中心繁荣之际的 Axe 能源承诺进行谈判
summary: Microsoft Corp. is in discussions to shelve one of the industry’s most ambitious clean-energy targets as it tries to remove hurdles that could hold it back in the race to power data centers, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: White House Prepares Order to Boost AI Security, Hassett Says
title_cn: 哈塞特表示，白宫准备发布加强人工智能安全的命令
summary: The White House is looking into an executive order that would create a vetting system for new artificial intelligence models like Anthropic PBC’s Mythos in a bid to protect business and government networks from AI-related cyber risks, a top economic adviser said Wednesday.

title: SpaceX Flags at Least $55 Billion Investment in Chip Plant
title_cn: SpaceX 预计将投资至少 550 亿美元建设芯片工厂
summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX estimated a chip factory it plans to build along with Tesla Inc. will cost at least $55 billion, with total investment potentially exceeding the amount the rocket maker aims to raise from a record initial public offering.

title: Viral $100 Kids Landline Startup Tin Can Debuts Bulk Order Program
title_cn: 100 美元儿童固定电话初创公司 Tin Can 首次推出批量订购计划
summary: Tin Can Untechnologies Inc., the startup behind the $100 landline for kids, is launching a bulk order program to make it easier for schools, sports teams and neighborhoods to get access to the viral product.

title: AI Bots Auditioning for Wall Street Trading Are Mostly Losing
title_cn: 参加华尔街交易面试的人工智能机器人大多失败
summary: AI isn’t ready to replace your fund manager — and the public experiments testing it are showing why.

title: Nintendo Under Pressure to Raise Switch 2 Prices to Protect Margins
title_cn: 任天堂面临提高 Switch 2 价格以保护利润的压力
summary: With shares on their worst streak in a decade, investors signal displeasure

title: Hut 8 to Lease Texas AI Data Center for at Least $9.8 Billion
title_cn: Hut 8 将以至少 98 亿美元的价格租赁德克萨斯州人工智能数据中心
summary: Hut 8 Corp., a cryptocurrency miner that is shifting to developing artificial intelligence data center capacity, has signed a lease worth at least $9.8 billion over 15 years to provide computing power to a “high-investment-grade company.”

title: Ametek to Buy Indicor Instrumentation for About $5 Billion
title_cn: Ametek 将以约 50 亿美元收购 Indicor Instrumentation
summary: Ametek Inc. agreed to buy a portfolio of instrumentation businesses from Indicor LLC for about $5 billion in cash.

title: 'Project Freedom' Pause, Stocks Rally as AI Spend Drives Tech | The Opening Trade 5/6/2026
title_cn: “自由计划”暂停，人工智能支出推动科技股上涨开盘交易 5/6/2026
summary:
Technology stocks are driving rallies in global equities as a wave of blockbuster earnings and deals highlights the relentless pace of investment in artificial intelligence.

Investors’ optimism was also buoyed by US President Donald Trump touting “Great Progress” toward a final peace deal with Iran. At a time when crude flows through the Strait of Hormuz remain at a near standstill, Brent slid on expectations that a settlement may be near. Bond yields fell in the US and Europe, while the dollar retreated against all major peers.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Super Micro Jumps on Outlook Signaling Costs Under Control
title_cn: Super Micro 的 Outlook 信令成本得到控制
summary: Super Micro Computer Inc. shares leaped in early trading after the company reported improved margins and gave a profit forecast that suggested it’s controlling the costs of getting powerful AI servers into customers’ hands.

title: Blue Owl Data Center Operator Stack Is Said to Consider $30 Billion Sale of Asia Operations
title_cn: 据称 Blue Owl 数据中心运营商堆栈将考虑以 300 亿美元出售亚洲业务
summary: Stack Infrastructure Inc., a data center company owned by Blue Owl Capital, is considering options including a sale of its Asia operations, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Infineon Forecast Beats as AI Boosts Power Chip Business
title_cn: 人工智能推动功率芯片业务，英飞凌预测超预期
summary: Infineon Technologies AG forecast revenue that beat analysts’ expectations in the current quarter as the German chipmaker benefits from a spending boom on artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: Thailand Clears $29 Billion Investments Led by TikTok Project
title_cn: 泰国完成 TikTok 项目牵头的 290 亿美元投资
summary: Thailand approved 958 billion baht ($29 billion) of investment projects, led by TikTok System (Thailand) Co.’s planned expansion of data infrastructure as the country pushes to become a regional hub for artificial intelligence and cloud services.

title: AI Is Pushing Chipmaking to Its Limits
title_cn: 人工智能正在将芯片制造推向极限
summary: Semiconductors power modern technology, from AI to everyday devices. Now, global tensions and rising demand are forcing the chip supply chain to adapt. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung Hits $1 Trillion Valuation, Joining TSMC in Elite Club
title_cn: 三星估值突破1万亿美元，加入台积电精英俱乐部
summary: Samsung Electronics Co.’s market valuation topped $1 trillion after shares in the world’s largest memory maker more than quadrupled over the past year on booming demand for the chips used in artificial intelligence.

title: Hyundai Robot Performs Handstand, Complex Gymnastics Moves
title_cn: 现代机器人表演倒立等复杂体操动作
summary: Hyundai Motor Co.’s robotics unit released a video showing its production-ready Atlas humanoid robot performing complex gymnastics, marking a first-of-its-kind live demonstration that could signal the machine is nearing commercialization.

title: China’s Chip Fund in Talks to Lead DeepSeek Funding, FT Says
title_cn: 英国《金融时报》称，中国芯片基金正在洽谈领投 DeepSeek 资金
summary: China’s main chip-sector investment fund is in discussions to lead a fundraising round for DeepSeek at a valuation of about $45 billion, the Financial Times reported, citing people with knowledge of the talks.

title: Gunman in DC Attack Built Arsenal to Target Officials
title_cn: 华盛顿特区袭击事件中的枪手建造了武器库以瞄准官员
summary: The man accused of storming the White House Correspondents’ Dinner spent years quietly acquiring his arsenal, purchasing a shotgun from a Torrance, California, firearms dealer eight months before the attack and a semi-automatic pistol two years earlier, according to a law enforcement intelligence profile reviewed by Bloomberg.

title: Iran Weighs Response to US Plan to End War as China Urges Peace
title_cn: 中国呼吁和平，伊朗考虑如何回应美国结束战争的计划
summary: Iran is evaluating a new proposal from the US to end their almost 10-week war, according to a person familiar with the matter, as China added its voice to global pressure to wrap up the conflict.

title: GOP House Chair Says Lutnick Not ‘100% Truthful’ on Epstein Ties
title_cn: 共和党众议院主席称卢特尼克在爱泼斯坦关系问题上并非“100%真实”
summary: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick, a former neighbor of Jeffrey Epstein who visited the disgraced financier on his Caribbean island, on Wednesday became the first sitting cabinet member to testify to the US House committee investigating the sex offender’s crimes and possible lapses in the law enforcement response.

title: How Trump Has Made the Doctor Shortage Worse
title_cn: 特朗普如何加剧医生短缺
summary: The administration is backing off one part of its sweeping immigration crackdown on overseas physicians, but applicants worry it may be too late to meet the critical residency and fellowship start date on July 1.

title: How Local UK Elections Could Decide Starmer’s Fate
title_cn: 英国地方选举如何决定斯塔默的命运
summary: Britons will head to the polls on Thursday for one of the most consequential rounds of local elections in memory, with control of the Scottish and Welsh parliaments and more than half of England’s councils at stake.

title: Trump Shows Control Over Republican Base With Primary Wins
title_cn: 特朗普以初选胜利显示出对共和党基础的控制
summary: President Donald Trump demonstrated his sway over the Republican party base in a deep red state after he supported a group of challengers to Indiana state senators who had defied the president by refusing his push for redistricting.

title: Probe of Trump Foes Upends Justice Department’s Miami Hub
title_cn: 对特朗普敌人的调查颠覆了司法部的迈阿密中心
summary: Shortly after ascending to the top of the Justice Department last month, Todd Blanche gathered prosecutors in Miami to press for results from a highly sensitive probe into some of President Donald Trump’s perceived political enemies.

title: US Plans to Intervene in Trump’s Supreme Court Carroll Appeal
title_cn: 美国计划干预特朗普最高法院卡罗尔上诉
summary: The US Justice Department will ask the Supreme Court to let it intervene in President Donald Trump’s appeal of the $83.3 million jury verdict against him in a defamation suit brought by former Elle magazine advice columnist E. Jean Carroll.

title: Greer Warns EU Tweaks Risk Watering Down US Trade Deal
title_cn: 格里尔警告欧盟调整削弱美国贸易协议的风险
summary: US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said changes the European Union is considering to a transatlantic trade deal could limit American exports to the bloc.

title: Greer Says Trump and Xi Will Discuss China’s Iran Oil Purchases
title_cn: 格里尔称特朗普和习近平将讨论中国购买伊朗石油
summary: US President Donald Trump will discuss China’s continued energy purchases from Iran when he meets with President Xi Jinping next week, according to US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer.

title: US to Adopt 25% Car Levy ‘Soon’ Unless EU Clears Trade Deal
title_cn: 除非欧盟达成贸易协议，否则美国将“很快”征收 25% 汽车税
summary: US Ambassador to the EU Andrew Puzder said Washington will implement 25% tariffs on cars and trucks from the European Union “relatively soon” if the bloc doesn’t swiftly ratify a long-delayed trade deal.

title: South Africa Treasury Threatens to Cut Johannesburg Funding
title_cn: 南非财政部威胁削减约翰内斯堡资金
summary: South African Finance Minister Enoch Godongwana told Johannesburg Mayor Dada Morero that state funding to the city will be halted unless a 10.3 billion-rand ($629-million) wage agreement is scrapped.

title: China Urges Opening of Hormuz in Iran Talks Before Xi-Trump Meet
title_cn: 中国敦促习特会前伊朗会谈开启霍尔木兹海峡
summary: China’s top diplomat called for the swift reopening of the Strait of Hormuz in a meeting with his Iranian counterpart, signaling Beijing’s urgency to resolve a global energy crisis just days before President Xi Jinping is set to meet with Donald Trump.

title: Trump to Meet With Brazil’s Lula Thursday for Economic Talks
title_cn: 特朗普周四将与巴西总统卢拉举行经济会谈
summary: President Donald Trump will host Brazilian counterpart Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva Thursday, amid tensions over the Iran war and its impact on the global economy.

title: Iran Evaluating US Proposal to End War as China Calls for Peace
title_cn: 中国呼吁和平，伊朗评估美国结束战争的提议
summary: Iran is evaluating a new proposal from the US to end their near 10-week war, according to a person familiar with the matter, as China added its voice to global pressure to wrap up the conflict.

title: Germany Pushes EU to Speed Decisions to Compete With US, China
title_cn: 德国敦促欧盟加快做出与美国和中国竞争的决定
summary: The European Union needs to move with far more agility in a rapidly changing geopolitical environment to compete with the US and China, Germany’s top diplomat said as he laid out a series of reform proposals.

title: Swiss-EU Deal Needs Change of Constitution, Bern Lawmakers Say
title_cn: 伯尔尼议员表示，瑞士与欧盟的协议需要修改宪法
summary: A deal revamping Swiss relations with the European Union requires a constitutional amendment, according to a panel of lawmakers whose views hint at the hurdles the agreement will face.

title: Trump Renews Pressure on Iran to Reopen Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 特朗普再次向伊朗施压，要求其重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
summary: President Donald Trump vowed to restart bombing Iran if Tehran does not agree to allow free passage through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Rubio’s Europe Trip is Another Chance on World Stage
title_cn: 卢比奥的欧洲之行是世界舞台上的又一次机会
summary: The secretary of State travels to Italy seeking to ease tensions with Europe and the pope

title: Russia Boosts Rainy-Day Fund for First Time in Almost a Year
title_cn: 俄罗斯近一年来首次增加应急基金
summary: Russia resumed purchases of foreign currency and gold for its National Wellbeing Fund for the first time since June last year, as a surge in oil prices driven by the war in the Middle East boosts export revenue.

title: Turkey Joins Elite Military Powers With Planned ICBM Test
title_cn: 土耳其加入精英军事强国计划进行洲际弹道导弹测试
summary: Turkey is taking a significant step toward joining the global military elite by testing a missile that would put much of Europe and the Middle East within reach and eventually lead to the launch of real-time intelligence satellites, according to people familiar with the plans.

title: How the UK’s Fragmented Politics Are Reshaping Policy Agenda
title_cn: 英国碎片化的政治如何重塑政策议程
summary: The Conservative-Labour duopoly that governed British politics for the past century appears locked in terminal decline. As a result, voters are no longer presented with a binary choice between opposing economic manifestos.

title: Greece Wins UK Court Ruling Over Its Controversial Debt Buyback
title_cn: 希腊赢得英国法院对其有争议的债务回购的裁决
summary: Greece correctly calculated the price at which it bought back GDP-linked warrants last year, a London court ruled Wednesday, settling a long-standing dispute over the government’s debt repurchase.

title: Egypt Inflation Unexpectedly Slows Despite Iran War Shocks
title_cn: 尽管受到伊朗战争冲击，埃及通胀仍意外放缓
summary: Egypt’s inflation rate unexpectedly slowed in April, even after the Iran war spurred higher fuel costs and a weakening of the currency.
